topStories.description: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

topStories.title: Iran says $270bn war loss must be compensated, as fresh talks with US loom
topStories.description: Iran demands compensation for war damages caused by US and Israeli attacks on critical infrastructure.

topStories.title: Infosys, TCS, Wipro, other IT stocks climb up to 5%. Here's why
topStories.description: IT stocks rallied up to 5% on Wednesday, driven by improved market sentiment on hopes of fresh Iran-US talks and easing concerns around AI disruption. After earlier losses due to AI and inflation worries, the sector is seeing a partial recovery, with Nifty IT emerging as a top gainer.

topStories.title: US military says blockade of Iran ports ‘completely’ halts economic trade
topStories.description: US Central Command say more than 10,000 armed forces members, as well as warships and planes, are involved in blockade.

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Warren Buffett on taxes: 'People at high end should be paying a lot more...'
topStories.description: With the US tax deadline here and the billionaire tax debate raging, Warren Buffett's words from 2010 ring louder than ever: ‘People at the high end should be paying a lot more in taxes.’

dailyNews.title: Nifty Smallcap Index Erases Iran War Losses Before Nifty 50, Midcap
dailyNews.description: The smallcap gauge gained as much as 2.4% on Wednesday, hitting 16,061 points, a level last seen on Feb. 27 before the outbreak of the US-Israel war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Suspect in string of random attacks in Georgia is naturalized citizen from UK, DHS says
dailyNews.description: The suspect in a string of random attacks in Georgia, including in the killing of a DHS employee, is a naturalized U.S. citizen from the U.K., according to the agency.

dailyNews.title: From Iran to the fake Jesus image, Trump is facing a growing backlash for his inflammatory rhetoric
dailyNews.description: Trump deleted an AI image of himself as Jesus after backlash from Catholic leaders and conservative allies, reigniting debate over his mental fitness.

dailyNews.title: DOJ sues Connecticut, New Haven over sanctuary policies: 'Open defiance'
dailyNews.description: The DOJ has filed a lawsuit against Connecticut and its city of New Haven, arguing that their sanctuary policies interfere with federal immigration enforcement.

dailyNews.title: House avoids unprecedented four-member expulsion week as Swalwell and Gonzales resign instead
dailyNews.description: Two House members resigned amid scandals, but potential expulsions of Reps. Cherfilus-McCormick and Mills raise parity and political math concerns.

dailyNews.title: New video shows Oklahoma high school principal tackling gunman who opened fire inside the school
dailyNews.description: New video shows Oklahoma high school principal Kirk Moore tackling a gunman and wrestling the weapon away from him after he allegedly opened fire inside Pauls Valley High School.

dailyNews.title: ‘Bachelorette’ star Taylor Frankie Paul won’t face new domestic violence charges
dailyNews.description: Taylor Frankie Paul avoids new domestic violence charges as Salt Lake County prosecutors cite statute of limitations and lack of sufficient evidence.

dailyNews.title: Colorado highway descends into chaos after massive 75-vehicle pileup, amid hazardous winter weather
dailyNews.description: Authorities say dozens of vehicles were caught in a pileup on a snow-covered stretch of I-70, forcing a major shutdown near the Eisenhower Tunnel.

dailyNews.title: Former UCLA gynecologist sentenced after pleading guilty to sexually assaulting patients at school
dailyNews.description: James Heaps, a former UCLA OB-GYN, pleaded guilty to 13 felony counts and was sentenced to 11 years in prison for sexually assaulting his patients.

dailyNews.title: Raiders GM John Spytek admits to getting 'a few calls' about the No 1 pick ahead of next week's NFL Draft
dailyNews.description: Las Vegas Raiders are expected to take Indiana QB Fernando Mendoza first overall, but GM John Spytek said teams are still calling about a trade up.

dailyNews.title: Suspect arrested after housekeeper tied up, attacked in Massachusetts mansion heist
dailyNews.description: A suspect was arrested after two masked men allegedly broke into a Beverly, Massachusetts, mansion and attacked a housekeeper before fleeing with money and valuables.

dailyNews.title: US military kills four alleged narco-terrorists in lethal strike on drug-trafficking vessel in Eastern Pacific
dailyNews.description: U.S. Southern Command says Joint Task Force Southern Spear killed four alleged narco-terrorists in a strike on an Eastern Pacific trafficking vessel.

dailyNews.title: Docs show migrant accused of killing Loyola student was flagged as flight risk before release
dailyNews.description: A Venezuelan migrant accused of fatally shooting Loyola student Sheridan Gorman was flagged as a flight risk before being released at the border in 2023.

topStories.description: The Justice Department is taking sweeping action to erase Jan. 6 convictions tied to Oath Keepers and Proud Boys leaders in major court filings.

topStories.title: Trump’s Blockade Risks Upending an Emerging Détente With China
topStories.description: In a thinly veiled critique of the war in Iran, China’s leader said the world could not risk reverting “to the law of the jungle.”

topStories.title: King Charles III and Queen Camilla Will Visit D.C., New York and Virginia
topStories.description: The planned four-day state visit comes at a fraught time in the U.S.-U.K. relationship, following President Trump’s frequent belittling of the British prime minister.

topStories.title: Justice Dept. Moves to Vacate Jan. 6 Convictions for Far-Right Extremists
topStories.description: Defending the convictions would likely have required administration officials to assert that far-right groups were acting on behalf of President Trump on Jan. 6, 2021.

topStories.title: U.S. says Iran ports blockade "fully implemented" as Trump weighs more talks
topStories.description: CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper says a blockade of Iranian ports "has been fully implemented," as the U.S.-Iran impasse over control of the Strait of Hormuz continues amid a delicate ceasefire.

topStories.title: "The noose is getting tighter" on Iran amid blockade, Middle East expert says
topStories.description: The White House said more than 100 empty oil tankers are heading to ports in the U.S. to load up on American crude as the U.S. blockade on the Strait of Hormuz continues for a second day. For more, Jon Alterman, the director of the Center for Strategic and International Studies' Middle East Program, joins "The Daily Report" to discuss.

topStories.title: Trump signals new talks with Iran to start soon
topStories.description: President Trump said new talks with the Iranian regime could start within days. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.description: President Trump's criticism of Pope Leo, and a Truth Social post appearing to depict the president as Jesus, have caused outrage among Christians, as well as some of Trump's allies. NBC News' Claudio Lavanga reports.

dailyNews.title: U.S. says Hormuz blockade 'fully implemented,' while signaling diplomatic off-ramp for Iran
dailyNews.description: The White House has been signaling a diplomatic solution to the conflict in the Middle East, as discussions around continuing negotiations with Tehran are underway.

dailyNews.title: Trump renews criticism of UK, saying it should ‘drill, baby, drill’ for North Sea oil
dailyNews.description: Trump's comments come at a time when the U.K. government has said the Iran war energy shock shows the need “to get off the fossil fuel rollercoaster.”

dailyNews.title: Trump takes aim at Pope Leo again, days after calling him 'weak on crime'
dailyNews.description: Trump's remarks came amid a running spat between the White House and the Vatican over the U.S.-Israel war against Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Hormuz blockade puts China, India in crosshairs as U.S. pressure on Iran spills over
dailyNews.description: The U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz risks ratcheting up pressure on two of its most consequential relationships in Asia — India and China.

dailyNews.title: What a United-American merger would mean, from antitrust hurdles to airfare
dailyNews.description: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby reportedly floated a potential merger with Trump administration officials earlier this year.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: US blockade 'fully implemented' CENTCOM commander says
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  The top internet searches surrounding Trump's now deleted AI post
dailyNews.description: An AI-generated image that President Donald Trump posted Monday on his social media platform that depicted him as a Jesus-like figure is drawing criticism and interest online.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  President Trump and Pope Leo in disagreement over war in Iran
dailyNews.description: Trump and Pope Leo's disagreement over the war in Iran was amplified after Trump attacked the pope on social media and posted a now-deleted AI-generated image that depicted him as a Jesus-like figure.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
